passages.text: Table 1. Clinical Trials Submitted in Support of Efficacy and Safety Determinations of the Janssen Ad26.COV2.S (COVID-19) Vaccine
Table 1. Clinical Trials Submitted in Support of Efficacy and Safety Determinations of the Janssen Ad26.COV2.S (COVID-19) Vaccine

data_rows.cell_text: Ad26.COV2.S 1x1011 vp 5x1010 vp 2.5x1010 vp 1.25x1010 vp; 1-dose and 2-dose regimens
Enrollment of adults ongoing; enrollment of adolescents not started

passages.text: Table 2. Analysis Populations

data_rows.cell_text: All participants who are randomized, regardless of the treatment status during the study.
All randomized participants with a documented study vaccine administration. The FAS was used for all analyses of safety except solicited adverse reactions.

All participants in the FAS who had no immunologic or virologic evidence of prior COVID-19 at the time of vaccination and no major protocol deviations that were judged to possibly impact the efficacy of the vaccine.
Subset of the full analysis set for the analysis of solicited and unsolicited AEs.
